title: Crispy Taco Monterey Jack Cheesy Agemono
description: A Mexican-inspired dish featuring crispy tacos, melted Monterey Jack cheese, and agemono. A perfect fusion of flavors and textures.
instructions: 2. In a pan over medium heat, warm the agemono.
3. In a separate pan, toast the crispy taco shells until golden brown.
4. In a bowl, mix the Mexican cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, and 1 tsp of golden taco seasoning.
5. Spoon the cheese mixture into the toasted taco shells.
6. Place the taco shells on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Remove the tacos from the oven and top with shredded Jack cheese, sour cream, and salsa.
